papers.title: Inhibitory control in children and adolescents with paediatric-onset obsessive-compulsive disorder - An fMRI study
papers.translated_title: 儿童和青少年期发病的强迫症患者的抑制控制——一项功能磁共振成像研究
papers.author: Larsen, K. M. M.
papers.summary: Background: The pathophysiology of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD) appears to involve dysfunctions in brain circuits underlying sensorimotor, cognitive, affective, and motivational processes. One area of dysfunction observed is disruption in inhibitory motor control. While functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has revealed associated alterations at the brain network level in adults, studies in pediatric OCD has yielded inconsistent results. Methods: This task-based fMRI study examined executive motor control in 65 unmedicated paediatric OCD patients and 58 age- and sex-matched healthy controls. Participants were aged eight to 17 years and performed a stop-signal task during whole-brain 3 Tesla fMRI. In addition to whole-brain analyses, we performed a region-of-interest analysis, focusing on brain regions subserving inhibitory motor control during the stop-signal task. Results: The paediatric patients with OCD showed comparable task performance and inhibition abilities to healthy controls. During both successful and failed inhibition, patients with paediatric OCD showed comparable whole brain activation patterns as compared to healthy controls. Conclusion: Our behavioural findings indicate typical inhibitory motor control proficiency in paediatric OCD patients together with comparable neural activation patterns when compared to controls. These findings, obtained in a large sample of unmedicated children and adolescents, suggest that alterations in inhibitory control may not be a prominent feature of early-stage OCD.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：强迫症（OCD）的病理生理机制涉及感觉运动、认知、情感和动机过程相关脑回路的功能障碍。其中一项观察到的功能障碍是抑制性运动控制的失调。尽管功能性磁共振成像（fMRI）已揭示成人患者脑网络层面的相关改变，但针对儿童强迫症的研究结果尚不一致。方法：本研究采用任务态fMRI，对65名未用药的儿童强迫症患者和58名年龄性别匹配的健康对照者进行执行性运动控制检测。参与者年龄为8至17岁，在3特斯拉全脑fMRI扫描期间执行停止信号任务。除全脑分析外，我们进行了感兴趣区域分析，重点关注停止信号任务中参与抑制性运动控制的脑区。结果：儿童强迫症患者与健康对照组在任务表现和抑制能力方面无显著差异。在成功抑制和失败抑制两种条件下，儿童强迫症患者的全脑激活模式与健康对照组相比均无显著差异。结论：行为学结果表明，儿童强迫症患者具有典型的抑制性运动控制能力，且神经激活模式与对照组相当。这些基于大样本未用药儿童和青少年群体的研究提示，抑制控制异常可能并非早期强迫症的显著特征。

papers.title: Data-driven trajectories of atrophy explain clinical heterogeneity across Lewy body diseases
papers.translated_title: 数据驱动的萎缩轨迹解释了路易体疾病中的临床异质性。
papers.author: Konuri, A.
papers.summary: Background: Lewy body diseases (LBD) collectively share alpha-synuclein Lewy pathology, yet present wide clinical heterogeneity, with overlapping motor and non-motor features and progression patterns that challenge traditional diagnostic boundaries. Methods: To resolve this spatiotemporal heterogeneity at the biological level, we applied a data-driven atrophy progression framework to MRI data from 833 individuals across Parkinsons disease (PD), dementia with Lewy bodies (DLB), and prodromal idiopathic REM sleep behaviour disorder (iRBD) using the Subtype and Stage Inference (SuStaIn) algorithm. Findings: Four transdiagnostic subtypes (A: Early cortico-limbic/late basal ganglia, B: Early basal ganglia/late limbic, C: Early temporo-limbic/late basal ganglia, and D: Early basal ganglia-cingulate/late cortex) emerged, each defined by a distinct spatiotemporal progression of atrophy that explained cognitive, motor, and psychiatric variability. An early cortico-limbic/late basal ganglia subtype represented a dementia-prone subtype across clinical diagnoses, with limbic involvement associating with the emergence of visual hallucinations. Interpretation: These biologically relevant spatiotemporal atrophy subtypes provide an interpretable stratification of patients with LBD, with potential to refine prognosis, improve clinical trial stratification, and guide precision therapeutic approaches. Funding: This work was made possible by an Ignition grant from the University of Sydney and University College London (Global Engagement Fund). Keywords: Dementia, Heterogeneity, Lewy body diseases, Subtypes, Neurodegeneration, Machine learning.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：路易体疾病（LBD）共同具有α-突触核蛋白路易病理特征，但临床表现高度异质性，运动与非运动症状及进展模式重叠，挑战传统诊断边界。方法：为在生物学层面解析这种时空异质性，我们采用数据驱动的萎缩进展框架，基于亚型与阶段推断（SuStaIn）算法，对833例帕金森病（PD）、路易体痴呆（DLB）及前驱期特发性快速眼动睡眠行为障碍（iRBD）患者的MRI数据进行分析。结果：发现四种跨诊断亚型（A型：早期皮质-边缘系统/晚期基底节；B型：早期基底节/晚期边缘系统；C型：早期颞叶-边缘系统/晚期基底节；D型：早期基底节-扣带回/晚期皮质），每种亚型具有独特的萎缩时空进展模式，可解释认知、运动及精神症状的变异性。其中早期皮质-边缘系统/晚期基底节亚型代表临床诊断中易发展为痴呆的亚型，边缘系统受累与幻视出现相关。解释：这些具有生物学意义的时空萎缩亚型为LBD患者提供了可解释的分层方法，有望优化预后评估、改善临床试验分层并指导精准治疗策略。资助：本研究由悉尼大学与伦敦大学学院（全球参与基金）的Ignition资助项目支持。关键词：痴呆，异质性，路易体疾病，亚型，神经退行性变，机器学习。

papers.title: AI-Derived ECG Age Gap as a Digital Biomarker for Cardiovascular Risk: External Validation in Hospital and Community-Based Prospective Cohorts
papers.translated_title: AI衍生心电图年龄差距作为心血管风险的数字生物标志物：在医院和社区前瞻性队列中的外部验证
papers.author: Huang, S.
papers.summary: Cardiovascular diseases remain the leading cause of global mortality, and early risk stratification is critical for improving prognosis. Artificial intelligence-derived electrocardiography (AI-ECG) provides a promising approach to deriving cardiac biological age as a non-invasive digital biomarker. This study developed an AI-ECG framework based on the ECGFounder foundation model to quantify cardiac biological aging and predict cardiovascular risk. A total of 67,824 ECGs from 63,512 UK Biobank participants were included. The model was trained on a development cohort of healthy individuals (n = 26,871) and evaluated in an independent clinical evaluation cohort (n = 40,953). Cox proportional hazards models were used to assess the association between the AI-ECG age gap and major adverse cardiovascular and cerebrovascular events (MACCE), as well as other secondary outcomes. External validation was further conducted in an inpatient cohort from Tianjin Medical University Second Hospital (n = 55,860) and the Kailuan community-based prospective cohort (n = 27,065). The model demonstrated good agreement between predicted and calendar age in the development cohort (r = 0.55; MAE = 5.12 years). In the clinical cohort, after adjusting for clinical comorbidities, each 1-year increase in the age gap was associated with a significant 13% higher risk of MACCE (HR = 1.13, 95% CI: 1.11-1.14). Individuals with an overestimated age gap (>6 years) exhibited substantially elevated risks of MACCE (HR = 4.51) and other major cardiovascular outcomes, whereas those with an underestimated age gap (<-6 years) showed a significantly lower risk of MACCE (HR = 0.46), alongside protective effects across other outcomes. In the external cohort, the AI-ECG age gap remained significantly associated with multiple downstream cardiovascular and cardiometabolic outcomes. The AI-ECG age gap effectively quantifies occult accelerated cardiac aging. As a non-invasive digital biomarker, it has substantial potential for cardiovascular risk stratification in broad populations.
papers.translated_summary: 心血管疾病仍是全球首要死因，早期风险分层对改善预后至关重要。基于人工智能的心电图（AI-ECG）技术为获取心脏生物学年龄这一非侵入性数字生物标志物提供了新途径。本研究基于ECGFounder基础模型开发了AI-ECG框架，用于量化心脏生物学衰老并预测心血管风险。研究纳入英国生物银行63,512名参与者的67,824份心电图，模型在健康人群开发队列（n=26,871）中训练，并在独立临床评估队列（n=40,953）中验证。采用Cox比例风险模型评估AI-ECG年龄差与主要不良心脑血管事件（MACCE）及其他次要结局的关联。外部验证进一步在天津医科大学第二医院住院队列（n=55,860）和开滦社区前瞻性队列（n=27,065）中开展。模型在开发队列中预测年龄与实际年龄一致性良好（r=0.55；MAE=5.12年）。临床队列中，校正临床合并症后，年龄差每增加1年，MACCE风险显著升高13%（HR=1.13，95%CI：1.11-1.14）。年龄差高估组（>6年）MACCE风险显著升高（HR=4.51），其他主要心血管结局风险亦显著增加；而年龄差低估组（<-6年）MACCE风险显著降低（HR=0.46），其他结局亦呈现保护效应。外部队列中，AI-ECG年龄差仍与多种下游心血管及心脏代谢结局显著相关。AI-ECG年龄差可有效量化隐匿性心脏加速衰老，作为非侵入性数字生物标志物，在广泛人群的心血管风险分层中具有重要应用潜力。

papers.title: Does performance on the Ages and Stages Questionnaire-3 assessment at age 2 estimate the effect on the Early Years Foundation Stage at age 5? A longitudinal observational study using routine data.
papers.translated_title: 2岁时在年龄与阶段问卷-3评估中的表现能否预测5岁时在早期基础阶段的效果？一项使用常规数据的纵向观察研究。
papers.author: Dickerson, J.
papers.summary: Introduction Improving the proportion of children achieving a good level of development (GLD) on the Early Years Foundation Stage Profile (EYFSP) aged five became a national priority in England in 2025. This study examined whether performance on the Ages and Stages Questionnaire-3 (ASQ-3) aged two can estimate the effect on the EYFSP. Methods A longitudinal dataset was created using linked Connected Yorkshire (Bradford) data. Multiple regression analyses estimated the effect of ASQ-3 on EYFSP and descriptive analyses explored the overlap between GLDs. Results Of 98,851 children born between September 2013 to May 2023, 47,046 (48%) had an ASQ-3 record and 6,021 had linked EYFSP data. Children who achieved a GLD on the ASQ-3 had over three-times the odds of achieving a GLD on the EYFSP (OR 3.18, 95% CI 2.70-3.75). Children who do not achieve a GLD on the ASQ-3 are very likely to not achieve a GLD on the EYFSP, however the ASQ-3 misses identification of 3 in 4 children who will not achieve a GLD on the EYFSP. Boys, those living in areas of deprivation, and those from White Other backgrounds were less likely to achieve an EYFSP GLD. Conclusion This study highlights the value of using ASQ-3 to identify children who will not achieve a GLD on the EYFSP. However, the ASQ-3 misses many other children at risk of not achieving a GLD on the EYFSP. There are inequities in early child development, and early identification and effective intervention are critical to reduce these inequities.
papers.translated_summary: 引言 提高五岁儿童在早期基础阶段档案（EYFSP）中达到良好发展水平（GLD）的比例，于2025年成为英格兰的国家优先事项。本研究探讨了两岁时年龄与阶段问卷-3（ASQ-3）的表现能否预测EYFSP的结果。方法 利用关联的约克郡（布拉德福德）数据创建纵向数据集。通过多元回归分析估计ASQ-3对EYFSP的影响，并通过描述性分析探究GLD之间的重叠情况。结果 在2013年9月至2023年5月出生的98,851名儿童中，47,046名（48%）有ASQ-3记录，6,021名有匹配的EYFSP数据。在ASQ-3中达到GLD的儿童，在EYFSP中达到GLD的几率超过三倍（OR 3.18，95% CI 2.70-3.75）。未在ASQ-3中达到GLD的儿童极有可能也无法在EYFSP中达到GLD，但ASQ-3遗漏了四分之三无法在EYFSP中达到GLD的儿童。男孩、生活在贫困地区的儿童以及来自其他白人背景的儿童，在EYFSP中达到GLD的可能性较低。结论 本研究凸显了使用ASQ-3识别无法在EYFSP中达到GLD的儿童的价值。然而，ASQ-3遗漏了许多其他面临无法在EYFSP中达到GLD风险的儿童。儿童早期发展存在不平等现象，早期识别和有效干预对于减少这些不平等至关重要。

papers.title: Alterations in Early Alpha-band Connectivity emerge in Infancy among children later diagnosed with Autism
papers.translated_title: 早期阿尔法波段连接性的改变在后来被诊断为自闭症的婴儿期儿童中出现。
papers.author: Chung, H.
papers.summary: Autism is a heterogeneous neurodevelopmental condition, often accompanied by challenges in language and cognitive development. Although atypical functional connectivity (FC) has been reported in autism, the timing of when it first emerges and its relevance for later behavior remain poorly understood. In this study, we examined developmental trajectories of alpha-band FC and network organization across the first three years of life. We computed global alpha-band measures, including peak alpha connectivity frequency (PACF), mean FC, clustering coefficient, and modularity, to characterize nonlinear developmental trajectories from longitudinal EEGs collected from 238 children (3-to-36-month-olds) with (Autism; n=58) and without (LL-noAutism; n=180) autism. Network-based statistics (NBS-Predict) identified subnetworks contributing to group differences at each age. Exploratory graph analyses (EGA) examined associations among FC, network measures, and language outcomes. We observed that PACF increased linearly with age in both groups. Global alpha-band connectivity measures showed a similar developmental pattern, with mean global FC, clustering coefficient, and modularity all increasing rapidly during the first year in both groups. Thereafter, these measures declined in the Autism group but continued to gradually increase in the LL-noAutism group. Compared to LL-noAutism, NBS-Predict identified both hyper- and hypo-connectivity subnetworks in Autism at 3 months, followed by a hypo-connectivity subnetwork at 24 and 36 months. EGA indicated that early hyperconnectivity predicted later hypoconnectivity and was associated with subsequent network organization and language outcomes. These findings indicate that altered alpha-band connectivity trajectories are detectable in infancy in children later diagnosed with autism and may contribute to later differences in developmental outcomes.
papers.translated_summary: 自闭症是一种异质性神经发育状况，常伴随语言和认知发展方面的挑战。尽管已有研究报道自闭症中存在异常的功能连接，但关于其首次出现的时间点以及后续行为的相关性仍知之甚少。本研究考察了生命前三年α波段功能连接和网络组织的发育轨迹。我们计算了全局α波段指标，包括峰值α连接频率、平均功能连接、聚类系数和模块化程度，以描述来自238名儿童（3至36个月大）的纵向脑电图数据中非线性发育轨迹，其中包含自闭症儿童（n=58）和非自闭症儿童（n=180）。基于网络的统计方法识别了各年龄段导致组间差异的子网络。探索性图分析检验了功能连接、网络指标与语言结果之间的关联。我们观察到两组儿童的峰值α连接频率均随年龄线性增长。全局α波段连接指标呈现相似发育模式：两组儿童的平均全局功能连接、聚类系数和模块化程度均在出生后第一年快速上升。此后，自闭症组这些指标开始下降，而非自闭症组则持续缓慢增长。与非自闭症组相比，基于网络的统计方法在3个月时识别出自闭症组同时存在超连接和低连接子网络，随后在24个月和36个月时仅存在低连接子网络。探索性图分析表明，早期超连接可预测后期低连接，并与后续网络组织和语言结果相关。这些发现表明，后来被诊断为自闭症的儿童在婴儿期即可检测到α波段连接轨迹的改变，这可能影响后续发育结果的差异。

papers.title: A large language model-assisted workflow for generating a living evidence base for climate-sensitive foodborne disease
papers.translated_title: 面向气候敏感性食源性疾病，一种基于大型语言模型辅助的工作流，用于生成动态证据库
papers.author: Elson, R.
papers.summary: Abstract Climate change is altering environmental conditions that influence foodborne disease transmission, yet traditional systematic reviews cannot keep pace with expanding evidence. We assessed whether an LLM-assisted workflow could generate a rapid, repeatable, and policy-relevant living evidence base for climate-sensitive foodborne disease. We combined structured PubMed searches (2010-2023), gold-standard human labelling, and iterative refinement of a GPT?4?Turbo?based auto-labeller within the SysRev platform. Pathogens of public-health importance in England were selected a priori. Model performance was evaluated against human reviewers using recall, precision, specificity, accuracy, and balanced accuracy. The refined inclusion model achieved 89{middle dot}2% recall, 59{middle dot}2% precision, 84{middle dot}5% specificity, and 85{middle dot}4% accuracy across 1,044 screened abstracts, identifying 436 studies for inclusion. Post-hoc re-evaluation of discordant abstracts showed that records excluded by the model but included during initial human screening did not meet the refined inclusion criteria. Frequently identified climate exposures included rainfall, temperature, seasonality, and humidity; norovirus, Salmonella, Campylobacter, and Cryptosporidium were the most common pathogens. An LLM-assisted workflow can generate living evidence for climate-sensitive foodborne disease with high recall and improved screening consistency. The approach is scalable, auditable, and suitable for secure institutional environments, supporting horizon scanning and climate-health risk assessment.
papers.translated_summary: 摘要 气候变化正在改变影响食源性疾病传播的环境条件，然而传统系统综述难以跟上不断增长的证据。我们评估了基于大语言模型辅助的工作流程能否为气候敏感性食源性疾病生成快速、可重复且具有政策参考价值的动态证据库。我们结合了结构化PubMed检索（2010-2023年）、金标准人工标注，以及在SysRev平台内对基于GPT-4 Turbo的自动标注器进行迭代优化。预先选定英格兰具有公共卫生重要性的病原体。通过召回率、精确率、特异性、准确率和平衡准确率评估模型性能与人工评审的对比。优化后的纳入模型在1044篇筛选摘要中实现了89.2%的召回率、59.2%的精确率、84.5%的特异性和85.4%的准确率，识别出436篇需纳入的研究。事后对不一致摘要的重新评估显示，被模型排除但初始人工筛选纳入的记录并不符合优化后的纳入标准。频繁识别的气候暴露因素包括降雨量、温度、季节性和湿度；诺如病毒、沙门氏菌、弯曲杆菌和隐孢子虫是最常见的病原体。基于大语言模型辅助的工作流程能够以高召回率和改进的筛选一致性生成气候敏感性食源性疾病的动态证据。该方法具有可扩展性、可审计性，适用于安全机构环境，可支持地平线扫描和气候健康风险评估。

papers.title: Behavioral determinants of preventive practices against German cockroach infestation among urban residents in Tehran, Iran
papers.translated_title: 伊朗德黑兰城市居民预防德国小蠊侵扰行为的决定因素
papers.author: Moshavernia, S.
papers.summary: Background German cockroach (Blattella germanica) infestation is an important urban environmental health menace associated with food contamination, allergic disease, and reduced quality of life. Long-term control depends not only on professional pest management, but also on residents knowledge and preventive behaviors. This study assessed the knowledge, Health belief model (HBM) constructs, self-efficacy, and preventive practices related to German cockroach infestation among urban residents in Tehran, Iran. Methods In this cross-sectional study, 120 adults with professionally confirmed household German cockroach infestation were recruited from licensed pest-control companies in Tehran. Data were collated using a 39-item HBM-based questionnaire assessing knowledge, perceived susceptibility, perceived severity, perceived benefits, perceived barriers, self-efficacy, and preventive practices. Descriptive statistics, Pearson correlation, and multiple linear regression were performed. Results Participants demonstrated modest knowledge regarding German cockroach biology (mean score: 0.538) and moderate preventive practices (3.157). Preventive practices were positively correlated with knowledge (r = 0.256, P = 0.005), perceived benefits (r = 0.292, P = 0.001), and self-efficacy (r = 0.244, P = 0.007). Regression analysis showed that the model explained 17.3% of the variance in preventive practices (R2 = 0.173, P = 0.001). Knowledge ({beta} = 0.191, P = 0.036), perceived benefits ({beta} = 0.231, P = 0.010), and self-efficacy ({beta} = 0.229, P = 0.012) were significant predictors. Conclusions Urban residents with confirmed German cockroach infestation showed limited knowledge and moderate preventive behaviors. Knowledge, perceived benefits, and self-efficacy were independently associated with preventive practices and demonstrated modest predictive value. Interventions targeting these behavioral factors, alongside environmental and structural improvements, may enhance sustainable household cockroach control.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 德国小蠊（Blattella germanica）侵扰是城市环境中重要的健康威胁，与食品污染、过敏性疾病及生活质量下降密切相关。长期控制不仅依赖专业虫害管理，还需居民的知识和预防行为。本研究评估了伊朗德黑兰城市居民关于德国小蠊侵扰的知识、健康信念模型（HBM）构念、自我效能及预防实践。方法 本横断面研究从德黑兰持证虫害防治公司招募了120名经专业确认家中存在德国小蠊侵扰的成年人。采用基于HBM的39项问卷收集数据，评估知识、感知易感性、感知严重性、感知益处、感知障碍、自我效能及预防实践。进行描述性统计、Pearson相关分析和多元线性回归。结果 参与者对德国小蠊生物学的知识水平一般（平均得分：0.538），预防实践水平中等（3.157）。预防实践与知识（r = 0.256，P = 0.005）、感知益处（r = 0.292，P = 0.001）和自我效能（r = 0.244，P = 0.007）呈正相关。回归分析显示，模型解释了预防实践17.3%的变异（R² = 0.173，P = 0.001）。知识（β = 0.191，P = 0.036）、感知益处（β = 0.231，P = 0.010）和自我效能（β = 0.229，P = 0.012）是显著预测因子。结论 经确认存在德国小蠊侵扰的城市居民知识有限，预防行为中等。知识、感知益处和自我效能与预防实践独立相关，并具有中等预测价值。针对这些行为因素的干预措施，结合环境和结构改善，可促进可持续的家庭蟑螂控制。

papers.title: Coffee Intake is Associated with Improved Insulin Sensitivity and Lower Visceral Adiposity: Evidence from Biomarker and Genetic Analysis
papers.translated_title: 咖啡摄入与改善胰岛素敏感性及降低内脏脂肪相关：来自生物标志物和遗传分析的证据
papers.author: Sevilla-Gonzalez, M.
papers.summary: Importance: Higher coffee intake has been associated with lower risk of type 2 diabetes (T2D), but the underlying biological pathways remain incompletely understood. Objective: To examine associations of coffee intake with insulin sensitivity, adiposity, and T2D risk, and assess whether coffee intake modifies associations between pathway-specific genetic susceptibility and incident T2D. Design, Setting, and Participants: Cross-sectional analyses among 806 participants without T2D in the VITamin D and OmegA-3 TriaL (VITAL) clinical sub-cohort, who underwent repeated dietary assessment, clinical phenotyping, and dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry imaging at baseline and year-2. Prospective analyses among 333,053 UK Biobank participants without T2D at baseline who had dietary and genetic data and were followed for a median of 13.3 years. Exposures: Coffee intake assessed by food frequency questionnaires. In UK Biobank, 12 pathway-specific polygenic scores (pPS) representing distinct T2D pathophysiological mechanisms were evaluated. Main Outcomes and Measures: The primary outcomes, in VITAL, were HbA1c, oral glucose tolerance test-derived measures of glucose response and insulin sensitivity, beta-cell function, and overall, truncal, and visceral adiposity; in UK Biobank, was incident T2D. Results: In VITAL, higher coffee intake was associated with higher insulin sensitivity (standardized beta; per cup/day, 0.046; P = .004) and lower visceral adipose tissue mass (beta -0.047; P = .006), after adjusting for demographic, lifestyle, and clinical factors, including body mass index. In UK Biobank, higher coffee intake was associated with lower T2D incidence (hazard ratio per cup/day, 0.96; 95% CI, 0.95-0.97), lower triglyceride-to-HDL cholesterol ratio (beta: -0.01; P = 2.51 x 10-19), and lower visceral adipose tissue mass (beta: -0.01; P = 4.28 x 10-9). Associations of 3 pPS related to insulin resistance and fat distribution with incident T2D were attenuated among participants consuming higher amount of coffee than among non-consumers (P for interaction < .0043). Conclusions and Relevance: Higher coffee intake was associated with greater insulin sensitivity, lower visceral adiposity, and lower risk of T2D. Together with the attenuation of associations between pathway-specific genetic susceptibility and T2D risk among higher coffee consumers, these findings suggest that insulin resistance and visceral adiposity-related pathways may contribute to the association between coffee intake and T2D risk.
papers.translated_summary: 重要性：较高的咖啡摄入量与较低的2型糖尿病风险相关，但其潜在生物学通路尚未完全明确。目的：探讨咖啡摄入量与胰岛素敏感性、肥胖及2型糖尿病风险的关系，并评估咖啡摄入量是否会改变通路特异性遗传易感性与2型糖尿病发病之间的关联。设计、背景与参与者：在维生素D和Omega-3试验（VITAL）临床亚队列中，对806名无2型糖尿病的参与者进行横断面分析，这些参与者在基线和第2年接受了重复膳食评估、临床表型分析及双能X线吸收测定成像。前瞻性分析纳入333,053名基线无2型糖尿病的英国生物银行参与者，他们拥有膳食和遗传数据，中位随访时间为13.3年。暴露因素：通过食物频率问卷评估咖啡摄入量。在英国生物银行中，评估了代表不同2型糖尿病病理生理机制的12个通路特异性多基因评分。主要结局与测量指标：在VITAL中，主要结局为糖化血红蛋白、口服葡萄糖耐量试验衍生的葡萄糖反应和胰岛素敏感性指标、β细胞功能，以及总体、躯干和内脏肥胖指标；在英国生物银行中，主要结局为2型糖尿病发病事件。结果：在VITAL中，调整人口学、生活方式和临床因素（包括体重指数）后，较高的咖啡摄入量与更高的胰岛素敏感性（标准化β值；每杯/天，0.046；P = 0.004）和更低的内脏脂肪组织质量（β值 -0.047；P = 0.006）相关。在英国生物银行中，较高的咖啡摄入量与较低的2型糖尿病发病率（每杯/天风险比，0.96；95%置信区间，0.95-0.97）、较低的三酰甘油与高密度脂蛋白胆固醇比值（β值：-0.01；P = 2.51 × 10⁻¹⁹）以及较低的内脏脂肪组织质量（β值：-0.01；P = 4.28 × 10⁻⁹）相关。在咖啡摄入量较高的参与者中，与胰岛素抵抗和脂肪分布相关的3个通路特异性多基因评分与2型糖尿病发病的关联较非咖啡饮用者减弱（交互作用P < 0.0043）。结论与相关性：较高的咖啡摄入量与更高的胰岛素敏感性、更低的内脏肥胖及更低的2型糖尿病风险相关。结合高咖啡摄入者中通路特异性遗传易感性与2型糖尿病风险关联的减弱，这些发现提示胰岛素抵抗和内脏肥胖相关通路可能介导了咖啡摄入量与2型糖尿病风险之间的关联。

papers.title: Racial and Ethnic Differences in Exposure to Antibiotics Associated with Clostridioides difficile Infection in US Academic Dental Care
papers.translated_title: 美国学术牙科护理中与艰难梭菌感染相关的抗生素暴露的种族和民族差异
papers.author: Gladden, A. D.
papers.summary: Background Severe Clostridioides difficile infection (CDI) morbidity and mortality disproportionately affect Black and Hispanic patients in the United States. Antibiotic exposure is the primary modifiable risk factor for CDI, and clindamycin is among the agents most strongly associated with related harm. Characterizing inequities in prescribing is critical. Dentistry is a major source of clindamycin prescriptions. Academic dental clinics serve diverse patient populations and provide an ideal setting to evaluate prescribing across racial and ethnic groups. We therefore examined antibiotic use and cumulative clindamycin exposure as measures of CDI-associated risk. Methods We conducted a retrospective study of electronic health records from 5 US academic dental institutions from 2021 through 2023. We analyzed 552,428 encounters among 132,770 patients with documented race/ethnicity to estimate adjusted odds of receiving any oral antibiotic and clindamycin by race/ethnicity. Secondary outcomes evaluated total antibiotic exposure among dental provider-prescribed antibiotics, focusing on higher-than-standard cumulative dosing of clindamycin (>8400 mg) and amoxicillin (>10,500 mg). Results Oral antibiotic prescribing occurred in 1.9% of encounters. Compared with White patients, Black, Hispanic, and Other race patients had slightly lower adjusted odds of receiving any oral antibiotic, while Black patients had greater odds of receiving a higher-than-standard cumulative clindamycin dose when clindamycin was prescribed (adjusted odds ratio, 2.19; 95% confidence interval, 1.25-3.82). Conclusion Racial and ethnic inequities in dental antibiotic prescribing extended beyond antibiotic receipt to cumulative clindamycin exposure. Although CDI outcomes were not directly measured, these prescribing differences may have implications for disparities in CDI-associated harm and warrant further investigation.
papers.translated_summary: 背景 在美国，重症艰难梭菌感染（CDI）的发病率和死亡率对黑人和西班牙裔患者影响尤为严重。抗生素暴露是CDI的主要可改变风险因素，而克林霉素是与相关危害关联最强的药物之一。处方中的不平等现象亟待明确。牙科是克林霉素处方的主要来源之一。学术牙科诊所服务多元化的患者群体，为评估不同种族和族裔群体的处方情况提供了理想环境。因此，我们研究了抗生素使用和累积克林霉素暴露量作为CDI相关风险的指标。方法 我们对2021年至2023年间美国5所学术牙科机构的电子健康记录进行了回顾性研究。分析了132,770名有明确种族/族裔记录的患者的552,428次就诊，以估算不同种族/族裔患者接受任何口服抗生素和克林霉素的调整后几率。次要结局评估了牙科医生处方抗生素的总暴露量，重点关注高于标准累积剂量的克林霉素（>8400毫克）和阿莫西林（>10,500毫克）。结果 口服抗生素处方占就诊次数的1.9%。与白人患者相比，黑人、西班牙裔和其他种族患者接受任何口服抗生素的调整后几率略低，但在开具克林霉素处方时，黑人患者接受高于标准累积剂量的几率更高（调整后比值比，2.19；95%置信区间，1.25-3.82）。结论 牙科抗生素处方中的种族和族裔不平等不仅体现在抗生素获取上，还延伸至累积克林霉素暴露量。尽管未直接测量CDI结局，但这些处方差异可能对CDI相关危害的不平等产生影响，值得进一步研究。

papers.title: Complex harmonic manifolds in mindfulness-based cognitive therapy for major depressive disorder
papers.translated_title: 基于正念认知疗法治疗重度抑郁症的复杂谐和流形
papers.author: Dagnino, P. C.
papers.summary: Major depressive disorder (MDD) is a heterogeneous mental disorder characterised by rumination. Mindfulness-based cognitive therapy (MBCT) is an evidence-based treatment developed to target rumination and recurrence risk. Ongoing studies have begun to identify neural changes associated with treatment effects. However, the low-dimensional organisation underlying whole-brain dynamics remains largely unexplored and may provide a more complete characterisation of the neural processes through which MBCT exerts its therapeutic effects in MDD. Here, we investigated functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) of a randomised controlled trial of MBCT with treatment as usual (TAU), or TAU alone, in a group of MDD patients (N=80). We applied a novel framework, complex harmonics decomposition (CHARM), to uncover low-dimensional manifolds in the spacetime domain, capturing local as well as non-local interactions made possible by brain criticality and amplified by the anatomical long-range connectivity. We successfully identified distinct distributed spatiotemporal manifolds across brain states and outperformed traditional dimensionality reduction techniques. During rumination after MBCT we found consistent recruitment of regions involved in bodily and interoceptive processing integrated within the whole-brain across manifolds, changes in latent configurations associated with clinical and behavioural improvements, and greater flexibility within the reduced space. Integration of bodily and interoceptive processing regions within distributed whole-brain manifolds and greater brain flexibility may be associated with reduced 'stickiness' of ruminative thinking patterns following mindfulness training in depression. Our findings highlight the promise of low-dimensional manifolds and long-range interactions arising from critical brain dynamics in understanding how mindfulness targets depressive ruminative processing.
papers.translated_summary: 重度抑郁症（MDD）是一种以反刍思维为特征的异质性精神障碍。正念认知疗法（MBCT）是针对反刍思维和复发风险开发的循证治疗方法。已有研究开始识别与治疗效果相关的神经变化，但支撑全脑动态的低维组织机制仍待深入探索，这种机制可能更完整地揭示MBCT对MDD患者产生治疗效果的神经过程。本研究对一组MDD患者（N=80）进行随机对照试验的功能磁共振成像（fMRI）分析，比较MBCT联合常规治疗（TAU）与单纯TAU的效果。我们采用新型框架——复谐波分解（CHARM），在时空域中揭示低维流形，捕捉由大脑临界性驱动、经解剖长程连接放大的局部与非局部相互作用。我们成功识别出跨脑状态的不同分布式时空流形，其表现优于传统降维技术。在MBCT后的反刍思维过程中，我们发现：参与身体感知与内感受处理的脑区在跨流形的全脑整合中呈现一致性募集；与临床及行为改善相关的潜在构型发生变化；降维空间内表现出更大灵活性。身体感知与内感受处理区域在分布式全脑流形中的整合，以及增强的脑灵活性，可能与抑郁患者接受正念训练后反刍思维模式"粘滞性"降低有关。我们的发现凸显了源于临界脑动力学的低维流形与长程相互作用在理解正念如何调节抑郁反刍处理过程中的重要价值。
